content: I am a second-year Ph.D. student at the National University of Singapore in School of Computing. I am currently working on Clinical Data Analysis with Prof. Vaibhav Rajan. Previously, I have worked on Represenation Learning, Natural Language Processing and Association Rule Mining. I have also built an efficient library for solving PDEs with JuliaLabs in MIT.
